title: Multi-Factor Authentication Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Multi-Factor Authentication Dashboard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#090a0f`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' rx='10' width='380' height='280' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <g transform='translate(50, 50)'>
    <rect x='-10' y='-10' rx='10' width='120' height='60' fill='#C06C88' opacity='0.5'/>
    <circle cx='0' cy='0' r='40' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
    <text x='-35' y='25' fill='#fff' font-size='18' text-anchor='end'>MFA Dashboard</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(50, 150)'>
    <rect x='20' y='20' rx='10' width='160' height='40' fill='#C06C88' opacity='0.5'/>
    <text x='30' y='40' fill='#fff' font-size='18'>Authenticator Configuration</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(220, 150)'>
    <rect x='20' y='20' rx='10' width='160' height='40' fill='#C06C88' opacity='0.5'/>
    <text x='30' y='40' fill='#fff' font-size='18'>Biometric Configuration</text>
  </g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use React Hooks to manage MFA settings and authenticator configuration state.
Must implement password and biometric authentication methods with corresponding verification processes.
Must display an error message when attempting to configure an invalid MFA method.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Multi-Factor Authentication Dashboard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, authenticator configuration logic, password and biometric authentication verification processes, and error handling.
Review code cleanliness, proper use of React Hooks, and efficient state management.
